title: Add homepage banner image
objective: Copy the provided banner image into the repository and update the homepage to use it as the banner background while preserving the current ATLAS text overlay and responsive behavior.
instructions: Copy /Users/yashturkar/Downloads/Gemini_Generated_Image_jznpqxjznpqxjznp (1).png into the repo as a stable banner asset under assets/.
Update index.html and/or assets/main.css so the homepage banner uses that image rather than a CSS-only panel.
Keep the current ATLAS title/date overlay legible on top of the image and preserve the existing single-page structure.
Maintain reasonable responsive behavior for the banner on narrower screens.
constraints: Do not perform any git operations.
Limit scope to the banner asset integration and only the minimum supporting HTML/CSS changes required.
expected_outputs: Banner image copied into assets and homepage updated to render it.
definition_of_done: A stable banner image file exists under assets/.
Homepage banner renders using the provided image with readable overlay text.
ResultPacket lists changed files and any doc implications.
